displayTitle: Keep the Phase, Keep the Truth

beats.narration: Everything the coil knows comes back as one carrier. It carries two facts: how big the signal is, and its phase against the oscillator.

payload.title: KEEP THE PHASE
payload.sub: Amplitude alone collapses every variable onto one number.
payload.panelLabel: ET COIL // ONE CARRIER, TWO FACTS

beats.narration: Old meters rectified the carrier and kept amplitude alone, so lift-off, conductivity, and cracks all piled onto one reading. Phase detection keeps both.
The detector multiplies the coil signal by a reference from its own oscillator, then filters. A second reference shifted ninety degrees gives X and Y.

payload.heading: Multiply, filter, recover the vector
payload.note: X = A·cos θ   ·   Y = A·sin θ   ·   A = √(X²+Y²),  θ = arctan(Y/X)

beats.narration: Those voltages drive the screen, so the flying dot is the signal vector from the null. Phase rotation turns the whole pattern together about that point.

payload.heading: From two voltages to the display

chips.s: Set by frequency, not the knob

beats.narration: Rotate lift-off horizontal for surface work, the through-wall hole near forty degrees for tubing. But real separation comes from frequency, never the knob.

payload.sub: The knob orients the picture; the physics sets the angle.
